name: openclaw-memory-max
description: SOTA Memory Suite for OpenClaw. Adds Utility-Weighted Retrieval, Active Context Compression, a Causal Knowledge Graph, Cross-Encoder Reranking, and Nightly Sleep-Cycle consolidation.
author: Stanislav Stolberg

scripts.audit: node -e "const db=require('./node_modules/better-sqlite3')('/home/claw/.openclaw/memory/main.sqlite'); const cols=db.prepare('PRAGMA table_info(chunks)').all(); const hasUtility=cols.some(c=>c.name==='utility_score'); console.log('utility_score column present:', hasUtility); const graph=require('fs').existsSync('/home/claw/.openclaw/memory/causal_graph.json'); console.log('causal_graph.json present:', graph);"
scripts.test: echo 'Audit the live server using: npm run audit'
